title: Building collapse in Victoria Street
description: GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - A building under...
bodyText:
Breaking News
                            Video

GEORGE NEWS & VIDEO - A building under construction in Victoria Street has collapsed.


> The public is urgently notified that access to Victoria Road is blocked from York Street.


Emergency services are on site and a number of ambulances will be required to enter the area due to multiple patients.

The public must please refrain from trying to view the incident and move away from Victoria Road so as to allow emergency vehicles easy access.


> VIDEO: Kristy Kolberg


Your browser does not support HTML5 video.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
